post.title: Thermal CFD Engineer
post.job_description: We need a CFD engineer for thermal-fluid and multiphase simulation work. The role includes ANSYS Fluent, heat transfer, solidification, thermal storage, reduced-order modeling, validation against experimental data, parametric studies, HPC execution, Python post-processing, and clear technical documentation.

core_skills.skills_list: RANS, external aerodynamics, thermal CFD, multiphase CFD, validation, post-processing
Thermal CFD, multiphase setup, UDF-style workflows, result interpretation
Conduction, convection, storage tanks, thermal design studies, temperature fields
VOF/Eulerian-style concepts, reactor modeling, phase interaction, validation
Phase change, thermal storage, solidification fronts, material-property effects
POD, surrogate models, parametric databases, fast design studies
pandas, NumPy, plotting, table generation, report-ready artifacts
Linux clusters, parametric runs, job logs, restart workflows, large simulation campaigns
Assumptions, setup choices, validation summaries, engineering recommendations

bullets.description: Modeled high-temperature thermal-storage systems using CFD and heat-transfer analysis.
Created heat-transfer design reports and engineering recommendations.
Studied solidification effects in thermal-fluid storage concepts.
Built multiphase CFD reactor models for process-engineering applications.
Validated simulation results against experimental measurements.
Translated CFD results into design guidance for engineering teams.
Developed reduced-order fluid-thermal models for fast simulation studies.
Ran parametric HPC simulation studies to build model databases.

selected_projects.label: Thermal Storage Solver
selected_projects.description: Thermal CFD workflow for high-temperature storage tanks, heat-transfer analysis, solidification effects, and engineering reports.

selected_projects.label: Multiphase Reactor Model
selected_projects.description: ANSYS Fluent multiphase CFD model for reactor flows, validation against experimental data, and design-oriented reporting.

selected_projects.label: Reduced-Order Heat Transfer Tool
selected_projects.description: Reduced-order modeling tool for fluid-thermal simulations, parametric sweeps, and fast design-space exploration.
